title: Create Trading Bots | almost free
author: Far_Bodybuilder6558
selftext:
hii everyone, i am quantitative developer i recently started freelancing. if anyone like i can create them custom trading bot for very low cost. i don't wanted to charge anything but i want review for my freelancing therefore i need to charge a small amount. if anyone is fine with that please let me know i will be happy to help you.

feel free to message me about any query.

Thanks😄

comments.author: Big_Sheepherder8950
comments.body: Hey, I am currently looking for a strategy to automate..do you have any good suggestions?

replies.author: Far_Bodybuilder6558
replies.body: before automating any strategy make sure it's backtest report is good.

comments.author: eggrally
comments.body: Literally anyone can vibe code a bot these days,  its all about the strategy.
